title: Non_Euclidean
description: Mixing a bunch of mods adds a fun twist to the immersive portals mod.
body: Check out this awesome mix of mods! You've got immersive portals that let you jump between worlds, a gravity changer that turns things upside down, and pehkui to resize your character. Plus, there's plenty more to explore. It's a fun way to shake up your gameplay and try out some cool stuff!
